The fact we've had RECORD RENEWALS the past two years under Trump is proof.

The fee only applied to new H-1B petitions for people outside the U.S. Renewals went to record levels.

Grand total payments of $100K made as of June 2026? 85.

2026 H-1B RENEWALS WILL BREAK RECORD

FY2025 already set the all-time H-1B renewal record at 291,542.

The focus is on the cap of 85,000, but renewals are how it compounds.

posts.author: DefiancetillDeath
posts.title: Trump Was Days From Restarting The War With Iran — Then One Meeting With His Generals Changed His Mind.

link_metadata.description: Trump reportedly came close to restarting the war with Iran this week — then met with his military advisers, didn't like what he heard, and reopened indirect talks instead. The timing may not be a coincidence: America's Strategic Petroleum Reserve is running low, and with Iran still choking a fifth of the world's oil through the Strait of Hormuz, Washington has less room to absorb a shock than it lets on. The sticking point remains the strait itself — Iran wants control and tolls, the U.S. refuses, and neither will budge.
link_metadata.title: Trump Was Days From Restarting the War With Iran — Then One Meeting With His Generals Changed His Mind
